items.title: 'On fire' Haaland sees Norway edge Senegal to make knockouts
items.summary: Erling Haaland's second-half double saw Norway beat Senegal 3-2 at a rain-swept MetLife Stadium as Stale Solbakken's side joined France in qualifying for the last 32 of the World Cup.

items.title: Norway win five-goal thriller against Senegal to make last 32
items.summary: Erling Haaland scores twice as Norway book their place in the last 32 of the World Cup with a 3-2 victory over Senegal in New Jersey.

items.title: 'Scoring machine' Haaland hits second double of World Cup
items.summary: Erling Haaland scored another World Cup double as Norway beat Senegal 3-2 in New Jersey.

items.title: Romantic moment Norway manager runs into crowd to passionately kiss wife seconds after World Cup win over Senegal
items.summary: NORWAY's manager ran straight into the stands to kiss his wife after qualifying for the World Cup knockout stages. The Scandinavians qualified with a 3-2 win over Senegal thanks in part to a double from Erling Haaland. But nobody was more pleased than Stale Solbakken, whose first thought after the v

items.title: A Golden Boot race for the ages - but who will come out on top?
items.summary: It is fast turning into a Golden Boot race for the ages as the world's best strikers star at the World Cup. But who will come out on top?

items.title: What France & Iraq did during 'mentally draining' two-hour weather delay
items.summary: France's World Cup match against Iraq was delayed for two hours because of the weather. BBC Sport look at how the sides dealt with it.

items.title: Kylian Mbappe spotted telling groundsmen where to mop after rain batters pitch in France World Cup win over Iraq
items.summary: KYLIAN MBAPPE had World Cup fans in stitches as he got involved in the pitch clearing efforts in Philadelphia.
